title: vitis × champinii
intro: Vitis × champinii, also known as the Chinese grapevine or muscadine, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Vitis vinifera and Vitis rotundifolia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Vitis × champinii include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a sought-after ingredient in herbal supplements and remedies. Herbal preparations of Vitis × champinii often include extracts, teas, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
